description_long: This is an elegant, vintage-style chaise with a dark charcoal gray upholstered body and a wooden frame featuring ornate detailing along the top and base. The backrest is high and gently curved, adorned with deep button tufting that adds a classic, luxurious touch. The armrests are integrated into the sweeping curve of the back, creating a continuous, enveloping silhouette. The seat consists of two large, plush cushions that appear soft and inviting, while the legs are short, wooden, and slightly curved, contributing to the antique aesthetic. The wood trim is finished in a rich, dark brown, providing a striking contrast to the fabric. This piece would be well-suited for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, stylish cafes, or residential lounges.
description: A vintage-style, dark gray upholstered chaise with ornate wooden trim, deep button tufting, and two plush seat cushions. The design features a high, curved backrest and integrated armrests for a classic, luxurious look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, tufted backrest, two seat cushions, and ornate wooden trim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chaise's curved profile, armrest integration, and plush seat depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden frame and the smooth, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, emphasizing the sweeping curve and armrest design.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is high, gently curved, and features deep button tufting across its surface, giving it a plush, classic appearance. It is framed by ornate wooden trim along the top edge, adding a decorative and vintage touch.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, seamlessly integrated into the curved backrest and following its continuous, enveloping shape.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, slightly curved, and made of wood with a polished dark brown finish. They have a subtle cabriole shape, contributing to the antique and elegant style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark gray with a visible button-tufted pattern on the backrest, while the seat cushions are smooth and unpatterned.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large, rectangular seat cushions placed side by side, both appearing loose and plush. The backrest is padded but not segmented into separate cushions.
